narrative:
Millcreek Township has 1,011 registered voters, with 45.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 36.2 percentage points.
